summary: P0 Bug Fixes Verification Complete - All 3 critical bugs verified FIXED (Iteration 31)

P0-1_home_predictions_count.description: GET /api/home no longer filters predictions by league_id
P0-1_home_predictions_count.evidence: my_predictions_count=1 returned for G18, my_points=3.0 for completed matchday

P0-1_live_is_special_multiplier.description: GET /api/live/{matchday_id} returns is_special and multiplier fields
P0-1_live_is_special_multiplier.evidence: G17: Inter vs Roma shows is_special=True, multiplier=3.0; G18: Milan vs Napoli shows is_special=True, multiplier=3.0

P0-1_scoring_with_multiplier.description: calculate_match_points receives multiplier parameter in all live scoring paths
P0-1_scoring_with_multiplier.evidence: multiplier=m.get('multiplier', 1.0) passed to calculate_match_points at lines 954, 2777, 2854

P0-2_g16_deleted.evidence: Admin matchday endpoint returns 404 for G16, fixtures list shows 0 matchdays with number=16

P0-3_fixtures_special_fields.evidence: 2 special matches found: G17 Inter vs Roma (x3.0), G18 Milan vs Napoli (x3.0)

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ P0-1 Fix VERIFIED: Prediction count in home endpoint (line 909) no longer filters by league_id
✓ P0-1 Fix VERIFIED: calculate_match_points receives multiplier parameter in home LIVE section (line 954) and live endpoint (lines 2777, 2854)
✓ P0-1 Fix VERIFIED: is_special and multiplier fields added to live endpoint response (lines 2802-2803)
✓ P0-2 Fix VERIFIED: G16 matchday completely removed from database (404 on access, 0 matchdays with number=16)
✓ P0-3 Fix VERIFIED: Fixtures endpoint returns matches with is_special/multiplier fields intact
NOTE: Match status is 'scheduled' for G17 matches, so points calculate to 0 (correct behavior per scoring.py logic)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 bugs from this sprint FIXED: P0-1 (home predictions count + live multiplier), P0-2 (G16 deleted), P0-3 (is_special/multiplier in API responses). Key IDs: G17=38df601f-49f7-47d1-8f7e-2aa524884f7d (Inter vs Roma special), G18=461d6479-2987-45b3-adc8-63f4ec2aed1a (Milan vs Napoli special), G16=68523813-a795-4a74-87ec-68bdd0b7ace0 (DELETED). NATIONAL_LEAGUE_ID=f1373417-43aa-4043-b6a2-125873181c95.

P0-1.bug: LIVE matchday shows 0.0 pts on Home screen, live scoring had wrong provisional points
P0-1.root_cause: Prediction queries filtered by league_id causing mismatch; multiplier not passed to calculate_match_points
P0-1.fix: Removed league_id filter from prediction queries (line 909), added multiplier parameter to all calculate_match_points calls

verified_data.live_endpoint: is_special and multiplier fields present in all match objects

P0-2.root_cause: Test matchday G16 still in DB
P0-2.fix: Deleted G16 matchday + all associated data from DB

P0-3.bug: X3 special match badge not showing in predictions screen
P0-3.root_cause: MatchItem TypeScript interface missing is_special/multiplier fields
P0-3.fix: Added fields to frontend type, and added is_special/multiplier to live endpoint response
